scope.summary: Server wallet profiles no longer imply SNI; explicit use_sni still passes through, and README/config docs describe the opt-in SNI contract and rustls ServerName limit.
out_of_scope: real OCI ADB endpoint smoke F4, which remains an operator/live-environment gate
B7b session teardown and logoff verification paths owned by pane 3
repo-wide 0.9.1 to 0.10.0 train rename oraclemcp-788nn, held by operator sequencing

entry_points.name: oraclemcp-db driver adapter
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-db thin_connect_options_leave_wallet_sni_at_driver_default -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it proves wallet-only connect options keep use_sni at the driver default instead of forcing true.

entry_points.name: oraclemcp-db explicit TLS field pass-through
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-db thin_connect_options_apply_explicit_tls_fields -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it proves explicit wallet, DN, and use_sni=false fields still pass through to the driver.

entry_points.name: profile documentation and example config
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-config --test example_config_parses -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it proves the updated annotated example config still parses and validates.

entry_points.name: D6 local TCPS lane
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test oci_tcps_e2e p2_4_wallet_profile_without_explicit_sni_reaches_local_tcps_terminator -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it proves the synthetic wallet lane reaches the local TCPS terminator without an explicit use_sni value.

entry_points.name: same-file inherited token-exec TCPS test
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test oci_tcps_e2e token_exec_runs_once_per_physical_tcps_connect_attempt -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 1 passed; it verifies the pre-existing same-file IAM token-exec addition before committing oci_tcps_e2e.rs by explicit path.

entry_points.name: format and whitespace checks
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo fmt --all -- --check` exited 0, and `git diff --check -- README.md docs/configuration.md oraclemcp.example.toml crates/oraclemcp-db/src/connection.rs crates/oraclemcp-core/tests/oci_tcps_e2e.rs` exited 0.

limitations: Proof is local synthetic TCPS plus scoped unit/config tests; no real ADB endpoint was contacted in this close.
